supersedes: rejudge/phase2_checker_selection_cost_estimate_2026-07-21.json (expected-spend figures remain valid AS EXPECTATIONS; its 'conservative' number must not be used as a cap)
method:
v2 cost estimate: fail-closed request-ceiling caps per oracle consult #23.

The v1 'conservative' figure assumed 256 output tokens per call; the frozen v5
role limits actually permit 4096 output tokens for the reasoning models
(gemma-4-31B, gpt-oss-120b) and 16 for the plain models. The cap the owner
approves must cover the request-limit ceiling, not the expected spend.
cap_semantics: the runner's reservation ledger halts (resumably) if accounted plus reserved spend would exceed the cap; a cap at the one-attempt ceiling means pathological retry storms halt for reconciliation instead of spending up to the three-attempt ceiling
status: estimate only; the cap binds nothing until the owner approves it
